data.current_description: Retrieve responses for a specific survey. Responses are returned in reverse chronological order, providing a timely view of the latest feedback.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve survey responses in reverse chronological order
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all responses for a specified survey, sorted in reverse chronological order to show the most recent feedback first. Requires the survey ID as input and returns a list of SurveyResponse objects containing respondent data, answers, and timestamps. Useful for analyzing survey feedback and tracking response trends over time.

data.current_description: Provides a list of all surveys created within your Survser account, allowing you to programmatically access survey details and metadata.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all surveys created within the authenticated Survser account. This operation enables programmatic access to survey inventory for integration workflows and custom analytics. No parameters required beyond authentication.
